MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-30-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. of GLASSBERG, POLLAK & ASSOCIATES 291-8320 for
Plaintiff. He is also specially appearing for defendant/moving party LAURENCE
DAVIS on the MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Mr. Auerbach represented in open court that both parties have reached a stipulation to set aside the judgment and to allow defendant DAVIS 20 days in which to respond. Stipulated order was signed in open court. (302/Hon. DIANE ELAN WICK) Court Reporter GENA EALES, CSR 9176 (456-4837)
